title: Just A Name - How It Works
description: The Ethereum Name Service (ENS) protocol has revolutionized the ease of transactions on the Ethereum blockchain, by replacing long, complex addresses with human-readable names. In an ongoing effort to further improve usability and efficiency, we have developed JustaName, a sophisticated platform designed to operate as an extension to ENS.
